## Problem

What can't you do today? Where does the current Desk get in your way?

## Proposed shape

How might this fit Desk's design? (Pull on the north stars — semantic anchoring, HCI investment, plugin extensibility — and you'll usually arrive at something that fits.)

## Alternatives

What did you consider and reject, and why?
